text_block_list.text:
Caught up preparing for an upcoming<n>networking
event outside the<n>academy, many students are
returning later than usual.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle, sob... I'm so, so scared...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek! N-no, no! Please don't eat me! I<n>don't tast—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wait... You're not a ghost...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry for yelling! Time just<n>got away
from me while I was doing<n>event prep.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I found myself alone in the dark and<n>scared... I
couldn't move! But I'm so<n>glad I'm not alone...
WHOOOOO'S THERE?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek! Wh-what now?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Hehehe. No one'shere.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Buuut! That's a win for me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: T-Turbo? What do you mean by<n>"win"?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So you were preparing for the event<n>and fell
asleep...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but then you heard footsteps<n>behind you and
ran away as fast as<n>you could?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I turbo-boosted right outta there!<n>And since I
don't hear any ghostly<n>footsteps anymore, that
means I win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but... in movies, sometimes people<n>think they've
gotten away when they<n>really haven't...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
No one can keep up with me! No<n>slowpoke
ghost's gonna catch me<n>like a deer in some red
tights!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I think she means "deer in the<n>headlights"...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but still, walking around in the dark<n>sure is
scary...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Really? You're scared, Rice? Then I'll<n>go home
with ya!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: But you'll hafta keep up with me andmy turbo boost!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What?!
choice_data_list: You'll be home in no time if you both run.

There might be a ghost waiting to get the jump on
you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I see... Y-yeah, you're right. The<n>faster we leave
school, the safer I'll<n>feel!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Youuu betcha! I'm a genius! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can you give us a starting<n>signal? The shoe
cabinet's the<n>finishing line! We'll sprint to that!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
WOOO! Bahahaha! This is awesome! I<n>can hear
our footsteps echoing<n>around!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe! And your laughter is echoing<n>too, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
BAHAHAHA! You're right! You<n>should try laughing
real loud too, Rice!

The footsteps and cheery voices of<n>the two
Umamusume echo throughout<n>the quiet school
building.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-the two of us? I suppose thatwould be less scary, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You'll be cursed with bad luck if you<n>go with me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...EEEEEK?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: GAHHHHH?! What?! What is it?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I saw a figure in the window just<n>now!
choice_data_list: Are you sure it wasn't your own shadow?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh... right... Aw, I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I'm pretty sure it's a ghost!<n>We gotta get
outta here before it<n>catches us!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, w-wait, Turbo! It really was just<n>my shadow!
Slip! THUD!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
GRAAAAAH! What's a banana peel<n>doing lying
around here?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh noooo! I'm so sorry, Turbo!You're getting hit with bad luckbecause you're with me!

Mayhem gives rise to more mayhem<n>as the two
run off in a fluster.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Now that's just a mean<n>ghost!

I explain to them that it's best for<n>everyone to
stick together instead of<n>running around in the
dark.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Right, I think it's riskier to run... And it<n>shouldn't be
scary if we're all<n>together...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Really? No running?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
...Okay! Then I'll go ahead and make<n>sure
nothing's waiting to ambush us!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Wow, I'm so glad she's here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait, no. I'm the older one here! I<n>need to step up!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! The coast's clear! No ghosts!<n>Hurry up!
C'moooon, let's goooo!

I leave the school building with Twin<n>Turbo running
around, full of energy,<n>and Rice Shower smiling
softly.
